posts.author: Angelo (Angelo)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Monday Community!

I’ve created a Board View App that uses Apollo to make the API requests to Monday. I have hardcoded in the API Key from my account but now want a way for the App to work for other users. I’ve been given some information which was a bit helpful but I am really struggling with this and hope someone can help me. I can follow the Documentation on getting the Auth Token using Postman but I’m having a hard time to translate that into my React Board View App.

Does anyone have any Board View App Auth code they wouldn’t mind showing me? Also, I’ve seen ‘seamless authentication’ in some webinars/documentation. Does that only go for the use of monday.api?

Many thanks everyone
